metadata.title: Live Chat | Adon ERP
metadata.description: Turn visitors into leads, customers, and loyal fans. Answer questions, solve problems, and build better relationships from one simple chat workspace.

hero.title: Every chat
hero.description: Turn visitors into leads, customers, and loyal fans. Answer questions, solve problems, and build better relationships from one simple chat workspace.

chatPreview.title: Superior Sips
chatPreview.description: Give visitors instant answers while they browse your store.

admin.name: Admin Peterson
messages: Hi! Are you looking for coffee beans?
I can recommend our best blend.
Would you like help placing an order?

answerSection.title: Answer
answerSection.subtitle: problems instantly
answerSection.description: Manage multiple conversations at once. Keep customer history, product context, and support information visible while chatting.

admin.name: Admin Peterson
messages: Do you have a recommendation for this product?
Yes, this option is best for your use case.

visitor.name: Visitor #87
messages: Do you have a recommendation for this product?
Yes, this option is best for your use case.

neverMissSection.title: Never miss
neverMissSection.subtitle: a message again
neverMissSection.description: Get real-time notifications, route conversations to the right team, and keep every visitor request connected to your business records.

helpSection.title: Help is just a click away
helpSection.description: Transform chats into support tickets instantly. Keep customer requests, internal notes, team collaboration, and resolution status in one clear workflow.

visitorToCustomerSection.title: Turn "visitor" into
visitorToCustomerSection.description: Convert website visitors into opportunities with live chat, automatic lead creation, customer records, and sales follow-up.

opportunity.title: Audrey Peterson's opportunity

notes.title: Notes
notes.text: Customer asked about pricing, delivery time, and product recommendations.

messages: I want to become a customer.
Great! I can create an opportunity.

chatbotSection.title: Meet Chatbot, your new teammate
chatbotSection.description: From greeting visitors to answering common questions, your chatbot can guide users, qualify leads, and escalate important conversations to your team.

cannedResponses.title: Canned responses
cannedResponses.description: Replace frequent replies with reusable answers and reply faster.

thirdPartyIntegration.title: 3rd Party Integration
thirdPartyIntegration.description: Connect Live Chat to website, ecommerce, CRM, helpdesk, and more.

searchTickets.title: Search for tickets
searchTickets.description: Find previous conversations and tickets without losing context.

routeAnalyze.title: Route and analyze performance
routeAnalyze.description: Measure response time, satisfaction, and agent productivity.

multiChannel.title: Multi channel management
multiChannel.description: Centralize chat, website conversations, support messages, and leads.

smartChat.title: Smart chat requests
smartChat.description: Assign conversations to the right team members automatically.

ctaSection.title: Join 15 million users
ctaSection.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: From what I have seen so far, Adon solved our intent problem better than any information workflow. It helped our team understand customers and continue the conversation smoothly.
testimonial.name: Mike Hills
testimonial.title: Sales lead
